item.title: digiKam [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: digiKam [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: digikamdeveloper
item.itunes:summary:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.description:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app

* Music radio streamer

* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

item.title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: rollerozxa
item.itunes:summary:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]
item.description:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]

item.title: Ads Regex [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Ads Regex [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ramanveerji
item.itunes:summary:
Ads Regex
(Utilities)
Our Ads Regex app is the ultimate tool for removing ads from your favorite Android apps and games with just a few taps. To make our app more interesting we have added more patches for you to choose from and play with your apps.
How It Works
Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.
Features
* Simple and intuitive interface
* No root access required
* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns
* Added several other patches to make the app more interesting
[read more]
item.description:
Ads Regex
(Utilities)
Our Ads Regex app is the ultimate tool for removing ads from your favorite Android apps and games with just a few taps. To make our app more interesting we have added more patches for you to choose from and play with your apps.

Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.
Features
* Simple and intuitive interface
* No root access required
* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns
* Added several other patches to make the app more interesting
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Ads Regex

Our Ads Regex app is the ultimate tool for removing ads from your favorite Android apps and games with just a few taps. To make our app more interesting we have added more patches for you to choose from and play with your apps.
How It Works
Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.
Features
* Simple and intuitive interface
* No root access required
* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns
* Added several other patches to make the app more interesting

item.title: Arch Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]
item.description:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]

item.title: Debian Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Debian Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Debian Mirror Changer
(Utilities)

hello world it me aaron or claudemods again
simply making your day easier if this is what your looking for
all has been tested works well

here is a script with
5 options to change debians mirrors
bookworm
trixie
sid
update
upgrade

v1.01 10/07/2024
new pyqt5 application
plushed it up a bit
simply run from konsole
sudo python3 nameoffile.bin
new update and upgrade options
now UTF8 standard for konsoles


if your a naughty forker
edit and republish as you wish
i have a template
please note the template has problems you will need to fix
problem 1 the functions take two long
though i did write the script
not sure if it works properly i exited konsole
when i saw functions taking long

[read more]
item.description:
Debian Mirror Changer
(Utilities)

hello world it me aaron or claudemods again
simply making your day easier if this is what your looking for
all has been tested works well

here is a script with
5 options to change debians mirrors
bookworm
trixie
sid
update
upgrade

v1.01 10/07/2024
new pyqt5 application
plushed it up a bit
simply run from konsole
sudo python3 nameoffile.bin
new update and upgrade options
now UTF8 standard for konsoles


if your a naughty forker
edit and republish as you wish
i have a template
please note the template has problems you will need to fix
problem 1 the functions take two long
though i did write the script
not sure if it works properly i exited konsole
when i saw functions taking long

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Debian Mirror Changer
(Utilities)

hello world it me aaron or claudemods again
simply making your day easier if this is what your looking for
all has been tested works well

here is a script with
5 options to change debians mirrors
bookworm
trixie
sid
update
upgrade

v1.01 10/07/2024
new pyqt5 application
plushed it up a bit
simply run from konsole
sudo python3 nameoffile.bin
new update and upgrade options
now UTF8 standard for konsoles


if your a naughty forker
edit and republish as you wish
i have a template
please note the template has problems you will need to fix
problem 1 the functions take two long
though i did write the script
not sure if it works properly i exited konsole
when i saw functions taking long

[read more]

item.title: plasma 6 cloner [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: plasma 6 cloner [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron or claudemods
after some research
i present a konsole script and a pyqt6 application

claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.01


first of all id like to credit Paju as i used some of his script from his widget
find his plasma 5 widget here >>> https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/

youtube video showcasing the features
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KIoC2uufIus
support me on paypal
https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

instructions to cloning

make your theme on breeze light only
you can change everything such as
desktop photo
taskbar layout including widgets
colours
ect.......

run the python script from konsole
python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

[read more]
item.description:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron or claudemods
after some research
i present a konsole script and a pyqt6 application

claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.01

taskbar layout including widgets

ect.......

python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron or claudemods
after some research
i present a konsole script and a pyqt6 application

claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.01


first of all id like to credit Paju as i used some of his script from his widget
find his plasma 5 widget here >>> https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/

youtube video showcasing the features
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KIoC2uufIus
support me on paypal
https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

instructions to cloning

make your theme on breeze light only
you can change everything such as
desktop photo
taskbar layout including widgets
colours
ect.......

run the python script from konsole
python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
